intro: This week on InstantViral Learn: How to Improve Audience Retention. Retention improves when openings deliver on the title promise and pacing removes fluff. Analyze drop-off graphs and rewrite structure before blaming discovery alone.
mainSummary: Retention improves when openings deliver on the title promise and pacing removes fluff. Analyze drop-off graphs and rewrite structure before blaming discovery alone.
